title: Beta Nether
description: Reverts the Nether back to its original form!
body:
# **Beta Nether**

**Update: This datapack will no longer be updated, here is a maintained but slightly different version - https://modrinth.com/datapack/legacy-nether-modrinth**

## **Description**

**Beta Nether** is a datapack that aims to recreate the Nether terrain that existed **before** the 1.16 update. This datapack is intended for people who want to revisit the old Nether Dimension of Minecraft again.

## **Features**

You can still find and play with the new features such as the **Bastion Remnants** and the **Crimson** and **Warped fungus** spawning inside Nether Fortress chests.

## **Nostalgia**

For the best nostalgic experience, I recommend using the **[Nostalgic Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks)** mod by **Adrenix** which includes many faithful recreations of old minecraft features alonside the **[Golden Days](https://github.com/PoeticRainbow/golden-days/releases)** resource pack by **PoeticRainbow**. Additionally, using the **[Modern Beta](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modern-beta)** mod by **b3spectacled** brings back the old nostalgic terrain generation.

## **Mod**

If you would like to use this as a mod instead of a datapack, I've made a mod for that: https://modrinth.com/mod/beta-nether-2.0

## **Support**

If you have questions or any issues with the datapack, you can report them in our discord server: https://discord.com/invite/Kc2jjJVhnx!
